category_sources: source_facts.description says Vim script Language Lint; official GitHub repository describes Vint as a Vim script language lint implemented in Python.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses Vint; source_facts.name is vint.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for installation and usage.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Vim script linting; source_facts.executables lists vint; official GitHub repository describes the implementation as Python.
